apihelp-homepagequestionstore-summary: Hel su’aalaha si habaysan loo qaabeeyey ee lagu soo gudbiyo iyada oo loo marayo modules-ka bogga hore
apihelp-homepagequestionstore-param-ques: Qaabka loo soo celinayo su’aalaha, tusaale ahaan HTML.
apihelp-homepagequestionstore-param-user: Aqoonsiga isticmaalaha ee lagu helayo su’aalaha.
apihelp-growthsetmentor-summary: U qoondee hagaha isticmaalaha. Isbeddelkan si furan ayaa loo diiwaangelin doonaa.
apihelp-growthsetmentor-param-mentee: Magaca isticmaalaha ee qofka la hagayo
apihelp-growthsetmentor-param-mentor: Magaca isticmaalaha ee qofka la hagayo
apihelp-query+growthimagesuggestiondata-: Haddii la heli karo, soo hel xogta soo jeedinta sawirrada ee la xiriirta [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/wikitech:Add_Image].
Aqoonsiga nooca hawsha (si loo caddeeyo in xogta la soo saarayo ay tahay mid ku saabsan soo jeedinta sawirrada heer maqaal ama heer qayb maqaal)
growthexperiments-homepage-imagesuggesti: Aqoonsiga nooca hawsha '$1' lagama helin habaynta wiki-ga.
apihelp-growthinvalidateimagerecommendat:
Marka la waco API-kan:

* Waxa uu dib u dejinayaa [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/wikitech:Add_Image calaamadda miisaanka leh ee "hasrecommendation:image"] ee maqaalka, si maqaalka aan mar dambe loogu soo celin natiijooyinka raadinta ee soo jeedinta sawirrada.

* Waxa uu ku darayaa maqaalka kayd muddo gaaban lagu hayo, kaas oo ay isticmaasho qaabka ImageRecommendationFilter ee [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:GrowthExperiments GrowthExperiments] si uu u go’aamiyo in maqaalka laga reebo liiska hawlaha la soo jeediyay ee isticmaalaha marka laga eego [[Special:Homepage]] ama API-ga [[Special:ApiHelp/query+growthtasks|action=query&list=growthtasks]].

* Waxa uu abuuraa oo diraa dhacdo loo diro EventGate kuna socota durdur [https://schema.wikimedia.org/#!/secondary/jsonschema/mediawiki/page/image-suggestions-feedback image-suggestion-feedback]. Tani waxay caawisaa hagaajinta nidaamka soo-jeedinta sawirrada, maadaama koodhka dhuumaha uu tixgelin karo jawaab celinta isticmaalayaasha marka la soo saarayo talooyinka.

Faahfaahin dheeraad ah: [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Growth/Personalized_first_day/Structured_tasks/Add_an_image mediawiki.org]
Nooca hawsha (heer maqaal ama heer qayb maqaal)
Cinwaanka maqaalka ay hawsha soo jeedinta sawirku ku saabsan tahay
Magaca faylka sawirka ee aan hore loo sii raacin, tusaale <kbd>Foo.jpg</kbd>
Cinwaanka qaybta maqaalka ee soo jeedinta sawirka ku saabsan tahay, tusaale <kbd>Taariikh</kbd>
Lambarka 1 ee qaybta maqaalka ee soo jeedinta sawirku ku saabsan tahay, tusaale <kbd>3</kbd>
